sglang.title: fix(model loader): use safe_open to prevent file handle leaks.
sglang.author: SimonCqk
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Unclosed file descriptors cause underlying I/O buffers to remain allocated. In environments that use a FUSE-based file system to accelerate model loading, this leads to excessive and prolonged memory consumption by the FUSE daemon, significantly impacting performance.
Ensures that each s

vllm.title: [Perf] Validate @config in pre-commit instead of dynamically
vllm.author: lionelvillard
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is about optimizing vLLM cold start by validating the code defining vLLM configuration at static time in precommit instead of at runtime. By doing so, vLLM cold start is reduced by at least 500ms per worker.

vllm.title: [Misc] Minor refactor of NIXL background handshake
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I believe having futures-handling logic in register_kv_caches hurts readability unnecessarily.
This PR just moves that logic into its own function.
It should also make future edits a bit easier, since the handshake path is under active development and we still haven't settled on a definitive way of

vllm.title: Add GLM-4.1V model
vllm.author: zRzRzRzRzRzRzR
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR aims to add support for the GLM-4.1V model.
Due to the upgrade of the implementation in the transformers library, some interfaces have been changed.
This model definitely needs to sample FPS and video duration.
The related transformers PR is here.

Currently, the Hunyuan inference team supports the Hunyuan-A13B model. By adding the hunyuan_v1.py related files, it supports the two models of HunYuanDenseV1ForCausalLM and HunYuanMoEV1ForCausalLM.
We have validated the accuracy of this PR，HunYuan (new MoE LLM model from Tencent) will o

vllm.title: [Misc] Minor refactoring for scheduler
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR implements minor refactoring for the scheduler, preparing for #19970.
Since the PR only re-locates the existing code without functionality changes, the correctness and performance should not be affected.

vllm.title: [Docs] Update transcriptions API to use openai client with `stream=True`
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Since openai/openai-python#2260 OpenAI official api client correctly handles the stream option for the audio.transcription api.
This PR simply adjusts the Docs to reflect that change.
I don't think there's a strong enough reason to update the requirements/common.txt list, but let me know in case you

vllm.title: [CUDA graphs] Enable full cuda graphs with FA3 AoT scheduling
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enables the full cuda graph with FA3 AoT scheduling.
Previously, AoT scheduling caused illegal memory access when the run-time split factor is larger than num_splits set by internal heuristics at capture-time.
This case can be prevented by explicitly setting num_splits (the upper bound) at b

This PR adds a new command-line option --expand-tools-even-if-tool-choice-none which allows including tool definitions in prompts even when tool_choice='none'.

vllm.title: [TPU] kv cache update kernel supports dynamic grid
vllm.author: yaochengji
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
In the kv_cache_update TPU kernel, we pad the input tensor slices to prevent recompilation, but this resulted in numerous trivial DMA copies. We now use the dynamic grid features of a Pallas kernel to eliminate most of them. It can provide more than 1% e2e throughput gain usually.
Test Plan

vllm.title: [Frontend] Support configurable mm placeholder strings & flexible video sampling policies via CLI flags.
vllm.author: huachenheli
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
New model additions currently suffer from two pain points:

Adding new multimodal models or modalities requires changing hard-coded _placeholder_str function in https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/main/vllm/entrypoints/chat_utils.py#L507. This is now configurable via --mm-placeholder-s

    --port 8001 \
